nodes.name: Watch 99_INBOX
nodes.notes: Watches 99_INBOX for any file change. Guard node filters to DECISION_LOG.md. If VAULT_PATH changes, update the path here and in both Code nodes.

nodes.name: Guard â€” DECISION_LOG only
nodes.notes: Requires NODE_FUNCTION_ALLOW_BUILTIN=fs in n8n env. Returns [] (stops execution) if changed file is not DECISION_LOG.md.

nodes.name: Parse + Write ESCALATED_ITEMS
nodes.notes: Reads markdown table from DECISION_LOG.md. Filters rows where Status = ESCALATED or DEFERRED. Writes OUTPUTS/ESCALATED_ITEMS.md. Returns [] (no-op) if nothing flagged.

_sfv_notes: Import: Settings â†’ Workflows â†’ Import from file
Before activating: set NODE_FUNCTION_ALLOW_BUILTIN=fs in n8n env (add to n8n_env.ps1)
After activating: trigger fires on any file change in 99_INBOX/ â€” Guard filters to DECISION_LOG.md
Output written to: 99_INBOX/OUTPUTS/ESCALATED_ITEMS.md (overwritten on each trigger)
Diverges from N8N_BLUEPRINT Workflow 4 spec intentionally: monitors DECISION_LOG instead of OUTPUTS/ per Will's 2026-05-26 instruction
